goal: Normalize command consistency: convert ship.md and tdd.md to Step heading format, add validate steps, add branch cleanup to key commands, fix implementer git add -A

tasks.name: Convert ship.md to Step headings and add branch cleanup
microSteps: Read ship.md — currently uses numbered list format (1-8)
Convert each numbered item to ### Step N: format matching other commands
Add branch cleanup step (from discuss.md pattern) before preflight

tdd.reason: Documentation-only change in markdown command file

tasks.action: Reformat ship.md from numbered list (1. 2. 3. ...) to ### Step N: heading format consistent with discuss.md, plan.md, implement.md, review.md. Add a Step 0a for merged branch cleanup (using the discuss.md pattern: `git branch --merged main | grep -v '^\*\|main' | xargs -r git branch -d`).

tasks.name: Add validate step to tdd.md and add branch cleanup to plan/implement
microSteps: Read tdd.md — currently 8 steps, no validate step
Add step 9: run workflow_validate.py before commit
Read plan.md and implement.md Step 0 sections
Add Step 0a branch cleanup to plan.md (after Step 0, before Step 1)
Add Step 0a branch cleanup to implement.md (after Step 0, before Step 1)

tdd.reason: Documentation-only changes in markdown command files

tasks.action: In tdd.md, add a validation step (step 8.5 or renumber) that runs `python3 .cnogo/scripts/workflow_validate.py` before the commit step. In plan.md and implement.md, add a Step 0a merged branch cleanup block (same pattern as discuss.md) between Step 0 and Step 1.

tasks.name: Fix implementer agent git add -A
microSteps: Change git add -A to git add <listed-files> pattern
Add note to only stage files from the task file scope

tdd.reason: Documentation-only change in markdown agent file

tasks.action: In implementer.md line 21, change `git add -A && git commit -m "task(<feature>): <task-name>"` to `git add <task-files> && git commit -m "task(<feature>): <task-name>"` where <task-files> are the files listed in the task description. Add a note that staging should only include files from the task's file scope, not `git add -A`.

commitMessage: docs(workflow): normalize command headings, add validate/cleanup steps, fix implementer staging
